en.extract:
The Cambodian laughingthrush (Garrulax ferrarius) is a species of bird in the family Leiothrichidae.  It used to be considered conspecific with the white-necked laughingthrush, G. strepitans.  It is found in southwestern Cambodia.  Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

The '''Cambodian laughingthrush''' ('''''Garrulax ferrarius''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Leiothrichidae]].  It used to be considered [[conspecific]] with the [[white-necked laughingthrush]], ''G. strepitans''.  It is found in southwestern [[Cambodia]].  Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.

zh.extract:
柬埔寨噪鹛（学名：Garrulax ferrarius），是画眉科噪鹛属的一种，为柬埔寨的特有种。该物种的保护状况被评为近危。
柬埔寨噪鹛的栖息地包括亚热带或热带的湿润低地林和亚热带或热带的湿润山地林。


参考文献
